title: Method for transmitting message and electronic device thereof
abstract: A method and an apparatus for transmitting a message in an electronic device are provided. The method for transmitting a hidden message includes displaying one or more hiding frames in an input message display area of a display, and transmitting a message including information on the hiding frame.
claims: 1. An electronic device comprising: a display device; a communication system; memory storing one or more computer programs; and one or more processors communicatively coupled to the display device, the communication system, and the memory, wherein the one or more computer programs include instructions that, when executed by the one or more processors, cause the electronic device to: receive a user input for inputting message content using a keypad while a message application is executed, control the display device to display, on a message display area of a display screen of the message application, a first layer comprising the message content, control the display device to display, on at least a portion of the message content, a second layer with a non-transparent effect to have the at least a portion of the message content hidden by the second layer, generate a message including information on the first layer and information associated with the second layer, and control the communication system to transmit the generated message, and wherein the generated message is configured to cause another electronic device to: display the message with the at least a portion of the message content being hidden by the second layer so that the at least a portion of the message content is unreadable, and display the at least a portion of the message content of the first layer in response to a touch gesture on the second layer being sensed at the other electronic device, and display again the second layer with the non-transparent effect on the at least a portion of the message content to hide the at least a portion of the message content at the other electronic device, after the at least a portion of the message content is displayed in response to the touch gesture.
